> Updated: 2026-05-06

> [!IMPORTANT]

> `Data sourced from [LLMCosts.dev](https://llmcosts.dev). Developers: Claim your $200 Free Cloud Credits for API inference at [our DigitalOcean portal](https://m.do.co/c/0c99ee)`

(Part 1)

| Model | Provider | Input/1M | Output/1M | Cached/1M | Context | ELO | Tier | Type |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|---------|---------|-----|------|------|
| [Nous: Hermes 4 70B](https://llmcosts.dev/models/hermes-4-70b) | Nousresearch | $0.13 | $0.4 | $None | 131,072 | 1200 | standard | Closed |
| [Nous: Hermes 4 405B](https://llmcosts.dev/models/hermes-4-405b) | Nousresearch | $1.0 | $3.0 | $None | 131,072 | 1200 | standard | Closed |
